Headline: TRADE: Rams acquires D.Newcomb from Falcons
Description: Rams and Falcons pulled off a straight swap. B. Fiske (DT, 80 OVR) heads to Falcons while D.Newcomb (DT, 80 OVR) crosses the other direction. Both teams address depth needs heading into the second half of the season.

Headline: TRADE: Falcons and Colts swap 2043 draft picks
Description: In a quiet pre-deadline move, Falcons and Colts exchanged future draft capital. Falcons sends their 2043 Round 2 pick to Colts in exchange for a Round 2 selection. Both teams are positioning for the future.

Headline: TRADE: Bills acquires J.Uwaezuoke from Bears
Description: Bills and Bears pulled off a straight swap. S.Dora (CB, 76 OVR) heads to Bears while J.Uwaezuoke (LEDG, 74 OVR) crosses the other direction. Both teams address depth needs heading into the second half of the season.
